title: Jamaican Pineapple Curry Festive Delight
description: A sweet and spicy Jamaican curry made with pineapple, perfect for festive gatherings. This curry is a unique blend of flavors and textures that will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: Festive spice mix
ingredients.notes: available in most grocery stores, or make your own mix of cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger

instructions: 1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the Jamaican curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add the pineapple, coconut milk, brown sugar, and festive spice mix. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the pineapple is tender.
5. Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
7. Serve warm, garnished with additional pineapple if desired.
